JUDGE WILLIAM BURLEIGH, BETH WILBER - CLERK, BRENDA FIELDS - REPORTER: C/C FOR CT. TRIAL, ARNOLD EVJE APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF, NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS ROMEO DEL RIO OR GLORIA VELLA. CASE PROCEEDS AS A PROVE-UP WITHOUT DEFENDANTS. JUDGMENT SUBMITTED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEL RIO, ROMEO VELLA, GLORIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2766 MISSION ST, #108 $1,437.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,437.00, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS PER COST BILL.
